children.value: how to jump to insert mode at end of line in vim
capital A for "Append at end of line." lowercase
appends after the cursor; uppercase jumps to the end first.
how is a different from i
inserts after it. so if your cursor is on the
goes to the first non-blank of the line and inserts,
goes to the end and inserts.
whats the diff between remote and origin in git

"remote" is the general concept: any named reference to another git repository you can fetch from or push to. "origin" is just the conventional default name git gives to a remote, typically the one you cloned from. you can have multiple remotes (origin, upstream, fork, whatever), and origin has no special powers beyond being the default name.

right, a remote is a repo somewhere other than your local one, usually on a server like github. your local repo keeps a list of these remotes (names plus urls) so it knows where to fetch from and push to.
